name: Deal Summary Generator
desc: Auto-generates structured deal summaries from CRM notes and call transcripts for weekly pipeline reviews.
prompt_summary: Extracts key deal metadata (stage, ARR, next steps, blockers) from unstructured CRM notes. Outputs a standardized one-page summary with confidence scores for each field. Runs on HubSpot webhook trigger.

name: Invoice Discrepancy Flagger
desc: Compares vendor invoices against PO terms and flags mismatches above threshold for AP review.
prompt_summary: Parses PDF invoices via OCR, extracts line items, and cross-references against approved PO database. Flags unit price variance >2%, quantity mismatches, and unapproved line items. Human reviewer required before any AP action.

name: Customer Health Score Digest
desc: Synthesizes product usage, support tickets, and NPS data into a weekly health score digest per account.
prompt_summary: Aggregates signals from Mixpanel (usage trends), Zendesk (ticket volume/sentiment), and Delighted (NPS). Produces a red/yellow/green health classification with plain-language reasoning. CSMs review before client outreach.

name: SOW Clause Extractor
desc: Pulls key commercial and delivery terms from signed SOWs into structured fields for the project tracker.
prompt_summary: Identifies and extracts: payment milestones, SLA commitments, scope boundaries, change order terms, and termination clauses from uploaded SOW PDFs. Outputs structured JSON for downstream project management tooling.

name: Weekly Metrics Narrator
desc: Converts raw KPI exports into a plain-English narrative for the Monday all-hands update.
prompt_summary: Ingests weekly KPI spreadsheet (revenue, burn, headcount, pipeline). Generates a 3-paragraph narrative highlighting WoW changes, anomalies, and items needing exec attention. Tone-matched to existing company update style.

name: Support Ticket Classifier
desc: Auto-tags incoming Zendesk tickets by product area, severity, and suggested routing.
prompt_summary: Classifies inbound tickets into product taxonomy (Billing, Integrations, Core Platform, Admin). Assigns severity (P1-P4) based on keyword detection and customer tier. Suggests routing to appropriate engineering pod. Agent reviews classification before routing.

name: Competitive Intel Summarizer
desc: Monitors competitor changelog and blog feeds, produces a weekly competitive digest for GTM.
prompt_summary: Scrapes RSS feeds and changelog pages for tracked competitors. Summarizes new features, pricing changes, and positioning shifts. Highlights items relevant to active deals. Sales team reviews for accuracy before distribution.

name: Expense Policy Checker
desc: Reviews submitted expense reports against company policy and flags violations before AP approval.
prompt_summary: Parses expense report line items and validates against policy rules: per-diem limits, approved vendor list, receipt requirements, manager approval chain. Flags violations with specific policy section references. AP team makes final determination.

name: Onboarding Checklist Generator
desc: Generates role-specific onboarding checklists from job description and team context.
prompt_summary: Takes job title, department, and manager as inputs. Generates a 30/60/90-day onboarding checklist with system access requests, training modules, and intro meeting suggestions. HR reviews and customizes before sending to new hire.

name: Board Deck Data Puller
desc: Aggregates cross-functional metrics into a pre-formatted board deck data appendix.
prompt_summary: Pulls data from finance (Stripe MRR, burn), sales (HubSpot pipeline), product (feature velocity), and CS (health scores). Formats into standardized board deck appendix tables. CoS reviews all numbers against source systems before inclusion.

name: RFP Response Drafter
desc: Generates first-draft RFP responses by matching questions against an internal knowledge base.
prompt_summary: Ingests RFP questions, searches internal knowledge base (past responses, product docs, security questionnaires) for relevant content. Generates draft answers with source citations. Sales engineer reviews and edits every response before submission.

name: Contract Renewal Risk Scorer
desc: Scores upcoming renewals by churn risk using usage, support, and engagement signals.
prompt_summary: Analyzes accounts 90 days from renewal: product usage trends, support ticket sentiment, exec sponsor engagement, payment history. Produces a 0-100 risk score with top 3 contributing factors. CS reviews scores weekly and adjusts outreach strategy.
